name: Verifone Commander Connector
description: Connect AROS to Verifone Commander POS. Sync fuel and c-store transactions, department sales, PLU data, shift reports, and payment network totals via LAN CGI API.
author: Nirlab Inc

siteId.label: Site ID
siteId.description: Unique identifier for this Commander site

commanderIp.label: Commander IP Address
commanderIp.description: LAN IP of the Commander device (e.g. 192.168.31.11)

syncIntervalMs.label: Sync interval (ms)
syncIntervalMs.description: How often to poll Commander for new data (default: 5 minutes)

hasFuel.label: Has Fuel
hasFuel.description: Enable fuel data sync (c-store with fuel dispensers)
